chunks.text: In today's video, we will see how to use class methods as alternative constructors.

chunks.title: Class Methods as Alternative Constructors in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes we have data in a certain format.

chunks.title: Class Methods as Alternative Constructors in Python

chunks.title: Class Methods as Alternative Constructors in Python
chunks.text: So we have to parse it from the beginning.

chunks.title: Class Methods as Alternative Constructors in Python
chunks.text: Then the constructor has to pass data.

chunks.title: Class Methods as Alternative Constructors in Python
chunks.text: We can solve this problem by using class methods as alternative constructors.

text: In today's video, we will see how to use class methods as alternative constructors. Sometimes we have data in a certain format. And in this case, if we pass data to the constructor in a wrong format, it will definitely throw an error. So we have to parse it from the beginning. Then the constructor has to pass data. We can solve this problem by using class methods as alternative constructors. How? I am going to tell you in this video. Let's go to the computer screen. Let's get started. How can class methods be used as alternative constructors? I will tell you today. Suppose I have a class employee. I am writing my example from scratch. Although I have given the example of a person here. But I am telling you from the beginning that how things will work here. Suppose I have an init method here. There is a constructor. There is no rocket science here. I have given the example of self.name. And then I have given the example of self.salary. I will write here self.name.salary. In fact, I will not do 12000 hard code. I will make this variable of salary. Now let's make an instance. I will write e is equal to employee. And then here is Harry. And salary is 12000. Is it okay? Is there an extra zero? No problem, we will keep that too. Now if I print this, I will say e.name. And then I will not tell you that Harry and 12000 will be printed. Because your time will be wasted in that. I will tell you directly how to use class methods like an alt constructor. Now suppose this was our idlesyn. Our work was going on. We were happy. Someone said that we will not give you data in the form of Harry and 12000. We will give you data in this form. We will make a string and give. And what you have to do is You have to get it out of that string. Harry-12000 Now you are getting one. You have to parse this string and get the data. And after that make an employee instance. Ideally, what will you do? You will say that you have bothered. No problem, you have bothered. We will open it a little. You will copy the same thing. You will say that I will do the same thing. What I did before. What I will do here is string.split. string.split string.split string.split And I will split it by dash. What will this do? Whenever we dash string.split, a list will be made. So what happens by splitting? When we split a string, I am pulling my terminal as an example. Just to tell you How this thing is done. I will write python and tell you. Python 3 I am in Mac. Now here I have written Harry-12-python Now I want to do a.split I will dash it. Something like this. What will happen? Harry-12-python A list will be printed. It will split it into pieces. And make a list. Where it did not get a dash, Then it will have a second element. Then it will have a second element. Then it will have a third element. So Harry-12-python A list of 3 elements. Now if I want Harry I will make a.split-0 If I want 12, I will make a.split-1 And 2 for python. So what I will do here is I will make employee.split-0 And After this I will make it a.split-1 I will make it 1 And after this I will make it e2 It will be a little easy I will make it e1 And now I will print it.
